maxPages.title: Max Pages
maxPages.description: Maximum pages to process in total.

maxDepth.title: Max Depth
maxDepth.description: Maximum link depth from each start URL.

sameDomainOnly.title: Same Domain Only
sameDomainOnly.description: Only follow links within start URL domains.

includePatterns.title: Include URL Patterns
includePatterns.description: Only include URLs matching these regex patterns (optional).

excludePatterns.title: Exclude URL Patterns
excludePatterns.description: Exclude URLs matching these regex patterns.

maxRetries.title: Max Retries
maxRetries.description: Retry failed pages up to this count.

retryBackoffSecs.title: Retry Backoff (seconds)
retryBackoffSecs.description: Base backoff in seconds, doubled each retry.

maxRequestsPerMinute.title: Max Requests Per Minute
maxRequestsPerMinute.description: Global rate limit. Set 0 for unlimited.

enableStealth.title: Enable Stealth
enableStealth.description: Enable stealth mode for tougher sites.

cleanContent.title: Clean Content
cleanContent.description: Remove navigation-heavy lines and normalize whitespace.

includeRawContent.title: Include Raw Content
includeRawContent.description: Include unmodified content output in a separate field.

maxContentChars.title: Max Content Characters
maxContentChars.description: Truncate content to this length (0 = unlimited).

contentExcerptChars.title: Content Excerpt Characters
contentExcerptChars.description: Length of the content excerpt for quick previews.

wordCountThreshold.title: Word Count Threshold
wordCountThreshold.description: Ignore text blocks with fewer words (0 = off). Reduces noise from empty or stub pages.

virtualScrollSelector.title: Virtual Scroll Selector
virtualScrollSelector.description: CSS selector for infinite-scroll container (e.g. #feed). When set, the crawler scrolls to load more content before extraction.

virtualScrollCount.title: Virtual Scroll Count
virtualScrollCount.description: Max scroll steps when virtual scroll is enabled.

waitUntil.title: Wait Until
waitUntil.description: Page load strategy: domcontentloaded (fast), load (full load), or networkidle (SPA/slow sites).

pageLoadWaitSecs.title: Page Load Wait (seconds)
pageLoadWaitSecs.description: Extra delay in seconds after load before capturing HTML. Use for slow/SPA sites.

waitForSelector.title: Wait For Selector
waitForSelector.description: CSS selector to wait for before extraction (e.g. .article-body or #main). Use css: or js: prefix for advanced conditions.

waitForTimeoutSecs.title: Wait For Timeout (seconds)
waitForTimeoutSecs.description: Max seconds to wait for Wait For Selector. Ignored if Wait For Selector is empty.

cssSelector.title: CSS Selector (extract region only)
cssSelector.description: Extract only content inside this CSS selector (e.g. main, .content, #article).

crawlMode.title: Crawl Mode
crawlMode.description: full = extract content; discover_only = only URLs and links (no content, fast).

includeLinkUrls.title: Include Link URLs
includeLinkUrls.description: Include links_internal and links_external arrays in each item (full mode only).
